Nubs Nob (Harbor Springs).conditions: Top 2-3 skate of the season this AM at Nubs. Firm and fast powertilled cord on all the loops with a deep track set. After 3+ feet of snow last weekend conditions have been world class since Tuesday. Forecast looks great for this upcoming week and World Cup level grooming will continue until they close in two weeks. Hard to imagine better conditions anywhere in North America currently. Thank you to the crew at Nubs for their commitment to Nordic skiing. Thanks to their efforts we have had an amazing uninterrupted season out there since December 1.

nubsNob.xcTrails: Trails were groomed on Sunday and conditions are very good.
nubsNob.comments: An inch of fresh snow fell on top of the machine groomed snow this morning. Expect a variety of conditions as the snow is set-up and firm in places and softer in other spots. Pintail Peak was groomed last and will have the softest snow. The soup of the day is an extremely tasty artichoke and roasted tomato chowder. Pintail Peak Lodge is open with an espresso bar. The lifts are spinning daily from 9:00 a.m. to 4:30 p.m. Make it a great day at Nub's Nob.
